Blameworthy is the term used to refer to an action being ethically unwanted. It is not a term implying the need for punishment

Is antonym is [[Praiseworthy]] which refers to an action being ethically wanted, which likewise does not imply the need for reward.

== Categories ==
*[[Suberogations]] (''makrooh)''
*[[Prohibitions]] (haraam)
== See Also ==

* [[suberogatory]]
[[Category:Ethics]]
[[sn:Blameworthy]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
